title: iguanura divergens
intro: Iguanura divergens, also known as the giant rat's tail plant or rat-tail palm, is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine in Southeast Asia, where it is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Iguanura divergens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and rhizomes of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tonics to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
